prompt:
The hikers misread the trail map at noon. ___, they ended up on the far side of the ridge by dusk.

Which transition most logically connects the two sentences?

choices.rationale: Correct. The link between the ideas is a cause-and-effect relationship.
This signals an additional, similar idea, but the sentences need a cause-and-effect relationship.
This signals an example, but the sentences need a cause-and-effect relationship.
This signals emphasis, but the sentences need a cause-and-effect relationship.

explanation: The second idea expresses a cause-and-effect relationship relative to the first, so a cause-signaling transition is needed.

prompt:

Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?

choices.rationale: This signals emphasis, but the sentences need an example.
This signals a cause-and-effect relationship, but the sentences need an example.
This signals a contrast, but the sentences need an example.
Correct. The link between the ideas is an example.

explanation: The second idea expresses an example relative to the first, so a example-signaling transition is needed.
